VAL-MAP-001.title: Direction Map page exists and is reachable

steps.observed: Homepage loaded with title '首页 - 翡翠信号图谱' and nav bar showing 首页, 方向地图, 产品线观察, 证据库

steps.action: Click 方向地图 in the navigation bar
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:8765/direction-map.html with title '方向地图 - 翡翠信号图谱', page shows heading '方向地图' and description '所有追踪方向的完整列表与对比视图'

VAL-MAP-001.notes: Direction Map page loads successfully with no console errors. Navigation from homepage works correctly.

VAL-MAP-002.title: All directions displayed with key metrics

steps.action: Inspect the Direction Map page table via accessibility snapshot
steps.expected: All 4 directions from data file listed with name, heat/magnitude, confidence, judgment state, and classification
steps.observed: Table shows 4 rows: (1) 18K 金镶翡翠 — ↑ +32%, 信心: 高, 值得跟, 已确认延续; (2) 多巴胺色系耳饰 — ↑ +24%, 信心: 中, 观察中, 观察实验; (3) 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴 — ↑ +18%, 信心: 中高, 需要补证据, 观察实验; (4) 冰感小件吊坠 — ↑ +12%, 信心: 中, 短热噪音, 暂缓. Additional columns: 受众适配 and 价格带.

steps.action: Take full-page screenshot to verify all 4 directions are visible
steps.observed: Full page screenshot confirms all 4 direction rows are visible in the table

evidence.snapshot: All 4 directions confirmed with columns: 方向名称, 热度, 置信度, 判断状态, 分类, 受众适配, 价格带

VAL-MAP-002.notes: All 4 directions are displayed with complete metrics including name, heat, confidence, judgment state, and classification.

VAL-MAP-003.title: Sort or comparison controls

steps.action: Identify sort and filter controls on the page
steps.expected: At least 2 sort or comparison controls
steps.observed: Found 3 sort buttons (按热度排序, 按置信度排序, 按名称排序) and 5 filter buttons (全部, 值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) — total 8 controls

steps.action: Click '按置信度排序' sort button
steps.expected: Table rows reorder by confidence level
steps.observed: Table reordered: 18K 金镶翡翠 (高) → 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴 (中高) → 多巴胺色系耳饰 (中) → 冰感小件吊坠 (中). Order changed from heat-sorted to confidence-sorted.

steps.expected: Only directions with 值得跟 judgment visible
steps.observed: Table filtered to show only 1 row: 18K 金镶翡翠 (the only 值得跟 direction). Other 3 rows hidden.
All 4 directions restored in the table

evidence.snapshot: 3 sort buttons + 5 filter buttons confirmed via interactive snapshot

VAL-MAP-003.notes: Page provides 3 sort controls and 5 filter controls (8 total, well exceeding the minimum of 2). Both sort and filter functions work correctly — sort reorders the table, filter shows/hides rows based on judgment state.

VAL-MAP-004.title: Direction Map content is entirely in Chinese

steps.action: Review all visible text on Direction Map via accessibility snapshot and screenshot
steps.observed: All text confirmed Chinese: page heading '方向地图', description '所有追踪方向的完整列表与对比视图', summary stats '追踪方向总数/值得跟/观察中/短热噪音', sort buttons '按热度排序/按置信度排序/按名称排序', filter buttons '全部/值得跟/观察中/短热噪音/需要补证据', table headers '方向名称/热度/置信度/判断状态/分类/受众适配/价格带', direction names, classification text, audience descriptions. No English UI text present.

evidence.snapshot: Full accessibility tree shows all labels, headers, buttons, and content in Chinese. Only non-Chinese text: numbers (+32%, +24%, +18%, +12%) and 'K' in '18K', which is technical metadata.

VAL-MAP-004.notes: All UI elements on the Direction Map page are in Chinese. Only acceptable non-Chinese characters are numbers and 'K' in product name '18K 金镶翡翠'.

VAL-CROSS-006.title: Direction Map direction click navigates to detail

steps.action: On Direction Map page, identify direction links in the table
steps.observed: All 4 direction names are links: 18K 金镶翡翠 → direction-detail.html?id=dir_001, 多巴胺色系耳饰 → dir_002, 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴 → dir_003, 冰感小件吊坠 → dir_004

steps.action: Click '18K 金镶翡翠' link on the Direction Map
steps.expected: Navigate to direction detail page for dir_001
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:8765/direction-detail.html?id=dir_001. Page shows heading '18K 金镶翡翠' with full detail content including 方向总览, 一句话建议, 产品线决策卡, etc.

VAL-CROSS-006.notes: Clicking a direction on the Direction Map correctly navigates to that direction's detail page with the correct content.

VAL-CROSS-004.title: Consistent visual style across all pages

steps.action: Visit all 5 pages and take screenshots for visual comparison
steps.expected: Same navigation bar, card styling, heading sizes, and color scheme across all pages
steps.observed: All 5 pages share: (1) Same green-and-white navigation bar with '翡翠信号图谱' branding on left and 4 nav items (首页/方向地图/产品线观察/证据库) on right; (2) Active page is highlighted with a bordered/outlined button style in the nav; (3) Consistent green accent color (#059669 or similar) used for links, tags, and highlights; (4) Same card styling with light backgrounds, subtle borders, and rounded corners; (5) Consistent heading hierarchy and font sizes; (6) Consistent color-coded judgment badges (green for 值得跟, blue for 观察中, orange for 短热噪音, gray for 需要补证据). No page looks like it belongs to a different product.

VAL-CROSS-004.notes: All 5 pages demonstrate consistent visual identity: same nav bar, card design, color scheme, typography, and judgment state color coding.

VAL-CROSS-005.title: All pages use Chinese language throughout

steps.action: Visit all 5 pages and examine text via accessibility snapshots
steps.expected: Chinese as default language for all UI elements — navigation, headers, labels, content, buttons. No English UI text.
steps.observed: All 5 pages confirmed Chinese throughout: (1) Homepage: 实时异动榜, 今日判断, 值得关注方向, 风险提醒, 最近证据, 产品线观察, 14天变化 — all Chinese; (2) Direction Map: 方向地图, 排序方式, 筛选判断, 按热度排序, etc. — all Chinese; (3) Direction Detail: 方向总览, 一句话建议, 产品线决策卡, 为什么会涨, 风险提醒, 证据入口 — all Chinese; (4) Evidence Library: 证据库, 方向, 产品线, 时间范围, 证据类型, 证据详情, 为什么被引用, etc. — all Chinese; (5) Product Line Watch: 产品线观察, 助推方向, 拖累方向, 整体状态 — all Chinese. Only non-Chinese text: numbers, percentages, and dates (technical metadata).

evidence.snapshots: Full accessibility snapshots of all 5 pages confirm all UI labels, headers, buttons, and content in Chinese

VAL-CROSS-005.notes: All 5 pages use Chinese throughout. The only non-Chinese characters are numbers (+32%, 2026-03-18) and 'K' in '18K', which are acceptable technical metadata.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Direction Map page loads correctly with all 4 directions showing complete metrics. Sort (3 options) and filter (5 options) controls work correctly. Clicking a direction navigates to its detail page. All 5 pages share consistent visual style and use Chinese throughout.
